personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platforms | ETL/ELT | Data Reliability

summary: Cloud-focused Data Engineer with 20+ years in enterprise systems and 7+ years delivering AWS-based data platforms, ETL/ELT pipelines, and analytics workflows. Strong Python/SQL foundation with hands-on experience designing scalable data flows, optimizing data models, improving pipeline reliability, and enabling cross-functional decision-making. Proven strength in performance engineering, migration patterns, and secure data operations in regulated environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated automated ETL/ELT pipelines (Python, Pandas, SQL) for telemetry ingestion from 6,000+ endpoints, improving reliability and delivery speed for analytics consumers.
Designed and optimized enterprise data models for historical retention, trend analysis, and executive reporting in a high-scale regulated environment.
Implemented pipeline data quality checks (cleansing, QA, anomaly detection) and monitoring practices to improve trust and SLA-aligned reporting outcomes.
Built and optimized AWS data workflows (Glue, Athena, S3) and translated on-prem engineering patterns into cloud-ready designs.
Collaborated with leadership and partner teams on process improvements, documentation, and roadmap execution for data platform reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported migration to AWS while improving observability and operational performance for business-critical systems.
Analyzed large telemetry datasets to identify bottlenecks and guide measurable optimization actions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led large-scale database migration from 200+ MySQL nodes to a consolidated high-performance Oracle RAC environment.
Built conversion/testing frameworks to preserve data integrity and performance during migration cutovers.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Designed monitoring, alerting, and extraction tooling across enterprise platforms, strengthening operational reliability and incident response.
Partnered with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot performance issues and optimize platform behavior.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed performance testing and capacity analysis for large-scale telecom applications using structured metrics and automation scripts.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills: Data Lake and Data Warehouse Architecture

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed serverless AWS data platform components and optimized ETL/data access patterns for enterprise workloads.

projects.name: HorizonScale Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built forecasting pipelines and analytics workflows to improve planning accuracy and reduce manual cycle time.
